channel.title: Ethan's Recsys Learning
channel.description: Personal feed for English shadowing - recsys MLE talks + BQ Q&A bundle
channel.itunes:author: Ethan Bai

item.title: Self-Intro + Why YouTube + Why Move (shadowing, 03:15)
item.description: Opening-question shadowing. onyx interviewer asks, 2s gap for self-prep, nova answers Ethan's finalized script. Three questions: Tell me about yourself, Why YouTube ranking, Why make a move. 2026-07 finalized versions.
item.itunes:author: Ethan Bai (onyx Q + nova A)

item.title: BQ Q&A Shadowing - Why Company + Customer Obsession + Are Right A Lot (11 questions, 26 min)
item.description: 11 BQ questions bundled for English shadowing. Each Q&A pair: interviewer voice (onyx) asks the question, 2s silent gap for self-prep, then nova voice answers Ethan's prepared story. Topics covered: Why Google YouTube Ranking, Why make a move, Customer Obsession (suggestion / X-but-really-Y / didn't meet expectation / above-and-beyond), Are Right A Lot (failure / disagree right / disagree wrong / incomplete data success / incomplete data failed). Total ~26 min.
item.itunes:author: Ethan Bai (OpenAI TTS shadowing - onyx Q + nova A)

item.title: Netflix's Big Bet: One Model to Rule Recommendations
item.description: Yesu Feng (Netflix) on building a foundation model for personalization. AI Engineer World's Fair 2025. ~22 min. [Audio volume +30%]
item.itunes:author: Yesu Feng, Netflix
